title: Editing a note while offline persists locally

testCases.given: the device is offline and a previously-synced note is loaded
testCases.when: the user edits the body and saves
testCases.then: the local store reflects the new body and the pending-sync queue contains one entry for this note

testCases.given: the device has been offline for an extended session with multiple edits
testCases.then: all pending edits survive into the next session
